headline: Amazon Seals Delivery Deal With USPS. How UPS And FedEx Shares Are Reacting.
summary: Amazon and the U.S. Postal Service have a parcel delivery in plan in place that will see a 20% reduction in package volumes. FedEx and UPS stock both fell around 1% on Monday.

raw.headline: Amazon Seals Delivery Deal With USPS. How UPS And FedEx Shares Are Reacting.
raw.summary: Amazon and the U.S. Postal Service have a parcel delivery in plan in place that will see a 20% reduction in package volumes. FedEx and UPS stock both fell around 1% on Monday.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Markets hold breath as Trump's Iran deadline nears
summary: Oil prices rose again as President Donald Trump stepped up his threats against Iran if Tehran does not come to a deal on the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: EasyPost Recognized With 2026 Solution of the Year and FedEx Diamond Award Honors
summary: LEHI, Utah, April 06, 2026--EasyPost has received both the Diamond Award and Compatible Solution of the Year Award from FedEx.

headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Kerman, California Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for Nearly 30 Years
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Kerman, CA to new owner, Helen Shergill-Barandalla. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential Shipping and Office Services provided by this PostalAnnex for nearly 30 years.

raw.headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Kerman, California Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for Nearly 30 Years
raw.summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Kerman, CA to new owner, Helen Shergill-Barandalla. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential Shipping and Office Services provided by this PostalAnnex for nearly 30 years.

headline: Argus Research Maintains Buy on FedEx, Raises Price Target to $400
summary: Argus Research  analyst John Eade   maintains FedEx (NYSE:FDX) with a Buy and raises the price target from $350 to $400.

raw.headline: Argus Research Maintains Buy on FedEx, Raises Price Target to $400
